NOTIFIABLE MEDICAL CONDITIONS SURVEILLANCE SYSTEM — Weekly IDSR Report

Author

The National Institute for Communicable Diseases

Published

April 30, 2026

Introduction

This document reports conditions notified to the Notifiable Medical Conditions Surveillance System (NMCSS) and flagged for reporting to WHO as part of the Integrated Disease Surveillance and Response (IDSR). Data was exported from the NMCSS on Monday, March 16, 2026 12:57 PM. It covers conditions reported for Epiweek 45 of 2025, which is from Sunday, November 02 to Saturday, November 08.

Please note: numbers reported are subject to change as verification and confirmation procedures are carried out. Numbers presented here are the best representation at the time of release.

For more notes on data interpretation please see the NMCSS Data Interpretation Infographic.

Category 1? Check Your Notification’s Done!
